headline: Western Union Grabs 15% Stake In Saudi Digital Payments Business
summary: The Western Union Company (NYSE: WU) has acquired a 15% stake in a Saudi Arabian digital payment business, Reuters reported.

headline: Wish Files For IPO, Acknowledges Challenges In Its China-Rooted Supply Chain
summary: Wish, the e-commerce platform known for low-priced Chinese-made goods, has filed for an IPO.

headline: Barron's Picks And Pans: Emerging Markets, Kandi, Simon Property, Plug Power And More
summary: The cover story from this weekend's Barron's discusses why now is the time for investors to start shopping abroad.

headline: Short Sellers Are Giving Up Amid COVID Bull Market: Bloomberg
summary: It's not just Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) skeptics who have been hit hard this year, as Benzinga noted yesterday.

headline: Apple Is Trying To 'Water Down' Bill Against Forced Labor In China: Washington Post
summary: Apple Inc (NASDAQ: AAPL) is trying to limit the impact of a bill aimed at fighting child labor in China, according to a Washington Post report.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Week: Moderna, Palantir, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	The bullish calls this past week included a struggling retailer and a Warren Buffett pick.
